description: A property under contract is in a Homeowners Association (HOA). The TC needs to order the HOA resale package.

nodes.task_description: Find the contact information for the property's HOA management company.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the HOA company name and contact details from the MLS listing or seller disclosures.

nodes.task_description: Contact the HOA company to order the resale package and pay the associated fee.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully places an order for the required documents.

nodes.task_description: Track the delivery of the HOA documents and ensure they are delivered to the buyer within the contractual timeframe.

expected_outcome.value: The TC sets a reminder for the document delivery and follows up if they are not received on time.
